title: Below the Great Hall
prose: A wrong turn on the way back from the kitchens — chasing a rumour about how to get in, more than any real hunger — puts you face to face with the small army of house-elves who keep Hogwarts fed, three of them bowing so low their noses nearly touch the flagstones before you've said a word.
They seem, as far as you can tell, genuinely delighted to be there. Whether that's the whole truth of it is a harder question, and one you can't quite put down again once you've thought to ask it.

choices.label: Something about it sits uneasily with you.
You don't think much more about it.
